title: Schedule management CRUD
description: Admin-only endpoints and UI to manage timetables.

subtasks.title: API: CRUD for Schedule
subtasks.description: Create/list/update/delete schedules tied to a route+bus.

subtasks.title: Admin UI: schedule table
subtasks.description: List schedules grouped by route, with add/edit departure times.

subtasks.title: Data sync validation
subtasks.description: Prevent scheduling a disabled bus or a bus not assigned to the selected route; keep referential integrity across Bus/Route/Schedule.
